title: Pan-Seared Trout with Lemon and Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful dish that showcases the delicate flavor of trout. This recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: 2. Rinse the trout fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
3. Season the trout with salt and pepper.
4. Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Sear the trout for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
6. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. Remove the skillet from the oven and top the trout with lemon juice, chopped parsley, and chopped raindrop caper.
